SourceText: 💡 It is normal to feel uncomfortable talking to children about abuse.
text: 💡 Kuqhelekile ukuziva ungakhululekanga ukuthetha nabantwana malunga nokuxhatshazwa.

SourceText: ❗ But there are some simple things that can help them understand when it is not OK to be touched, and what they should do if something ever happens.
text: ❗ Kodwa zikhona izinto ezilula ezinokubanceda baqonde xa KUNGALUNGANGA ukuphathwa, kwaye kufuneka benze ntoni ukuba kukho into ethe yenzeka.

SourceText: 🔑 It lets them know that they are in control of who can touch their body and in what way.
text: 🔑Ibazisa ukuba ngabo abalawulayo ukuba ngubani onokubamba imizimba yabo kwaye ngayiphi indlela.

SourceText: 🌷 This prepares them to keep themselves safe throughout their lives!
text: 🌷 Lento ibalungiselela ukuba bahlale bezikhusele kubomi babo bonke!

SourceText: True or False: Parents should wait until their children are school-aged before talking about risks of sexual abuse.

SourceText: 🌷 It is never too early to talk with your child about how to keep them safe from sexual abuse.
text: 🌷 Akusoze kubekwamsinya ukuthetha nomntwana wakho malunga nokumgcina ekhuselekile ekuxhatshazweni ngokwesondo.

SourceText: 🧸 Even young children can learn about which parts of their body are private and which parts are public.
text: 🧸 Kwanabo abantwana abancinci bangafunda malunga nokuba ngawaphi amalungu omzimba angasese kwaye ngawaphi amalungu aseluntwini.

SourceText: 💡 They can also learn that it is important for them to tell you if anybody touches them in an inappropriate way.
text: 💡 Bangafunda nangento yokuba kubalulekile ukuba bakuxelele ukuba kukho nabani na obabamba ngendlela engafanelekanga.

SourceText: ❗ Confronting the person who did it often makes it worse, so it is better to help your child stay away from the person and report them to the police or at a clinic.

SourceText: {F1_FATHER} wants to help his young children learn about safe and unsafe touch. Let’s see how he has the conversation with his young son, {F1_SON_5}.
text: {F1_FATHER} ufuna ukunceda abantwana bakhe abancinci bafunde ngokhuseleko kunye nokuphathwa okungakhuselekanga. Masikhe sibone ukuba uncokola njani nonyana wakhe omncinci, {F1_SON_5}.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Did you enjoy the story, {F1_SON_5}?
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Ingaba ulonwabele ibali, {F1_SON_5}?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Yes, {F1_FATHER}! It was fun!
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ewe, {F1_FATHER}! Belimnandi!

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**:  Now, there are some important things I want to talk to you about. It's about keeping your body safe and healthy.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**:  Ngoku, kukho izinto ezibalulekileyo endifuna ukuthetha ngazo nawe. Imalunga nokugcina umzimba wakho ukhuselekile kwaye usempilweni.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: What do you mean, {F1_FATHER}?
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Uthetha ukuthini, {F1_FATHER}?

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: First, we all have private parts on our bodies. These are the parts that are covered by our underwear.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Okokuqala, sonke sinawo amalungu angasese emizimbeni yethu. Lamalungu ngala agqunywa yimpahla yangaphantsi.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Like this?
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ngolu hlobo?

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Exactly. It's important to remember that these parts are private, and no one should touch them except to keep you clean and healthy.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Kanye. Kubalulekile ukukhumbula ukuba la ngamalungu angasese, kwaye akukhomntu ofanele ukuwaphatha ngaphandle kokuba uyacocwa ukuze uhlale usempilweni.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Your body belongs to you, and you have the right to say "no" if someone wants to touch you in a way that feels uncomfortable or wrong.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Umzimba wakho ngowakho, kwaye unelungelo lokuthi 'hayi' ukuba omnye umntu ufuna ukukuphatha ngendlela ekwenza uzive ungakhululekanga okanye engalunganga.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Okay, {F1_FATHER}.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Kulungile, {F1_FATHER}.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: And if anything ever happens that makes you feel scared or uneasy, remember you can always come and tell me or {F1_MOTHER}. We're here to protect you and keep you safe.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Kwaye ukuba nantoni na ethi yenzeke kuwe ikwenza uzive usoyika okanye ungakhululeki, khumbula ungasoloko usiza kum undixelele okanye {F1_MOTHER}. Silapha ukuzokhusela wena kunye nokugcina ukhuselekile.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: I will tell you and {F1_MOTHER}, {F1_FATHER}.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ndizakuxelela wena kunye {F1_MOTHER}, {F1_FATHER}.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: We love you, **{F1_SON_5}. Now, let's give each other a big hug!
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Siyakuthanda, {F1_SON_5}. Ngoku, Masiwolaneni kakhulu!

SourceText: 😔 It is normal to feel uncomfortable about talking to children about abuse.
text: 😔 Kuqhelekile ukuziva ungakhululekanga ukuthetha nabantwana malunga nokuxhatshazwa.

SourceText: 💡 But there are some simple things that can help them understand when it is not OK to be touched, and what they should do if something ever happens.
text: 💡 Kodwa zikhona izinto ezilula ezinokubanceda baqonde xa KUNGALUNGANGA ukuphathwa, kwaye kufuneka benze ntoni ukuba kukho into ethe yenzeka.

SourceText: Here’s a story about a time {F3_DAUGHTER_7} felt unsafe about someone touching her.
text: Nali ibali elingexesha apho u{F3_DAUGHTER_7} wayeziva engakhuselekanga malunga nomntu omphathayo.

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: (Tearing up) {F3_MOTHER}, Uncle gives very long hugs! I don’t like them.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: (Echiphiza inyembezi) {F3_MOTHER}, Umalume undiwola ixesha elide! Andithandi.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Oh dear, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}, that is not OK. Thank you for telling me about it.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Owu sithandwa, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}, oko AKULUNGANGA. Enkosi ngokundixelela malunga ngalomba.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: If he ever tries to give you a hug again, you can tell him, “No, let’s rather shake hands,” and tell me straight away. Shall we practise?
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Ukuba ukhe wazama ukukuwola futhi, ungamxelela, “Hayi, kungcono sixhawulane izandla,” kwaye undixelele kwangoko. Singaziqhelanisa noku?

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: (Practising) No, let’s rather shake hands, please.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: (Ukuziqhelanisa) Hayi, kungcono sixhawulane izandla, ndiyacela.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Well done, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}. I love you very much and I’m so glad you spoke to me about it. If Uncle makes you feel uncomfortable again, you must tell me immediately. You should always feel safe and comfortable with the people around you.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Wenze kakuhle, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}. Ndiyakuthanda kakhulu kwaye ndiyavuya uthethile nam malunga nayo. Ukuba uMalume ukwenza uzive ungakhululekanga kwakhona, uzundixelele ngokukhawuleza. Kufuneka uzive ukhuselekile kwaye ukhululekile ngalo lonke ixesha xa unabantu abakungqongileyo.

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Thank you, {F3_MOTHER}. I’m glad I can tell you about these things.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Enkosi, {F3_MOTHER}. Ndiyavuya ukuba ndingakuxelela ngezi zinto.

SourceText: Let’s check in on {F2_SON_8} and his grandmother after {F2_SON_8} finds himself in an uncomfortable situation:
text: Makhe sijongeni ku{F2_SON_8} kunye nomakhulu wakhe emvakokuba u{F2_SON_8} ezifumana ekwimeko engamkhululekisiyo:

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: {F2_GRANDMOTHER}, I was playing in the garden. Something happened!!
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: {F2_GRANDMOTHER}, Bendidlala egadini. Kukho into eyenzekileyo!!

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: What is it, {F2_SON_8}!? Take a breath and tell me.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Yintoni, {F2_SON_8}!? Phefumla kwaye undixelele.

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: Hi boy. You are so good at kicking that ball and you look so strong! I wish I could kick a ball like you. What’s your name?
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: Molo nkwenkwe. Uyikhaba kakuhle ibhola kwaye ubonakala womelele! Ndinqwenela ukuba ndingakhaba ibhola njengawe. Ungubani igama lakho?

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: My name is {F2_SON_8}.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Igama lam ndingu{F2_SON_8}.

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, such a beautiful name.
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, lihle igama lakho.

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: Thank you.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Enkosi.

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, I have chips and some toys for you in my car. If you come in, you can eat chips and play with all the toys, I promise…
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, Ndineetshipsi kunye neethoyi zakho emotweni yam. Ukuba uyangena, ungazitya iitshipsi kwaye udlale ngeethoyi, Ndiyakuthembisa…

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: No, thank you.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Hayi, enkosi.

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: Graaannnnyyyyyy!!
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Makhuuuuulu!!

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: {F2_SON_8}, I’m so proud of you for not getting out of our yard and getting into the car. You remembered the rules we created about safety in this community. That was a dangerous situation. You are so brave. Thank you for telling me. I will report it so it doesn’t happen again.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: {F2_SON_8}, Ndiyazingca ngawe ngokungaphumi ngapha kweyadi kunye nokungangeni emotweni. Uyikhumbulile imithetho ebesiyenzile malunga nokukhuseleka apha ekuhlaleni. Leyana ibiyimeko enobungozi. Unesibindi. Enkosi ngokundixelela. Ndizakuyichaza ukuze ingaphinde yenzeke kwakhona.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to respond when our children are in crisis.❗
text: Esi sifundo simalunga nokufunda ukuba sisabela kanjani xa abantwana bethu besengxakini.❗

SourceText: When our children share something that is very hard or upsetting to them😔😣, we need to remember to stay calm, listen, and be open, so that they feel supported. 💛
text: Xa abantwana bethu besabelana ngento enzima kakhulu okanye ebakhathazayo😔😣, kufuneka sikhumbule ukuhlala sizolile, simamele, kwaye sivuleleke ukuze bazive bexhaswa. 💛

SourceText: True or False: When my child is upset, I should wait for them to come to me. I don’t want to upset them further by asking what is troubling them.
text: Yinyani okanye Ayonyani: Xa umntwana wam ekhathazekile, kufuneka ndimlinde aze kum. Andifuni ukumcaphukisa nangakumbi ngokumbuza yintoni emhluphayo.

SourceText: 😣 When children are in crisis, they may be scared to tell others about it for many reasons. They may be worried about others judging them or getting angry. They may also feel shame.
text: 😣 Xa abantwana besengxakini, bangoyika ukuxelela abanye malunga noku ngenxa yezizathu ezininzi. Bangakhathazwa kukuba abanye bazakubagweba okanye babacaphukise. Bangaziva benazo neentloni.

SourceText: 💚 You can ask your child very calmly about why they seem upset. 👀
text: 💚 Ungambuza umntwana wakho ngokuzolileyo malunga nokuba kutheni ebonakala ekhathazekile. 👀

SourceText: 👂 Assure them that you are proud of how brave they are to share their crisis with you.
text: 👂 Mqinisekise ukuba uyazingca ngendlela abenesibindi ngayo ngokwabelana ingxaki yakhe nawe.

SourceText: 🌷 That’s right!
text: 🌷 Oku kulungile!

SourceText: {F1_SON_5} looks upset. Let’s see how his father responds:
text: {F1_SON_5} Ubonakala ekhathazekile. Masikhe sibone utata wakhe, uphendula njani:

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: I don't want to play with Daniel today.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Andifuni ukudlala no Daniel namhlanje.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: What happened, {F1_SON_5}? I thought you and Daniel were friends. Do you want to talk about it?
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Kwenzeke ntoni, {F1_SON_5}? Bendicinga wena kunye no Daniel ningabahlobo. Uyafuna ukuthetha ngayo?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}** (crying): He and some of the other kids were mean to me. They said I was stupid because I can’t button my shirt properly.
text: **{F1_SON_5}** (elila): Yena kunye nabanye abantwana bebekrwada kum. Bathe ndisisidenge ngenxa yokuba ndingakwazi ukuqhobosha ihempe yam kakuhle.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}** : Oh my {F1_SON_5}, that is not a very nice thing to say to someone. I can understand why you would feel upset about this.
text: **{F1_FATHER}** : Owu{F1_SON_5}, ayiyonto intle leyo ukuyithetha emntwini. Ndiyasiqonda isizathu sokuba ungaziva ukhathazekile ngale nto.

SourceText: First of all, you are not stupid! I am so proud of how much you are growing and learning. It is important that Daniel and the others know that it is not okay to say mean things. Would you like me to come with you so that we can have a chat with the others together?
text: Okokuqala, awusiso isidenge! Ndiyazingca ngendlela okhula ngayo kwaye nofunda ngayo. Kubalulekile ukuba uDaniel kunye nabanye bayazi ukuba akulunganga ukutsho izinto ezimbi. Ungathanda ukuba ndihambe nawe ukuze sincokole nabanye sisonke?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Okay…
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Kulungile…

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: I can also have a chat with Daniel's parents to let them know. Daniel is a good boy and is usually nice to you so maybe there is something else happening.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Ndingakwazi nokuncokola nabazali bakaDaniel ndibazise. U Daniel yinkwenkwe elungileyo kwaye uhlala enobubele kuwe mhlawumbi kukho enye into eyenzekayo.

SourceText: Thank you for sharing with me, {F1_SON_5}. I am very proud of you.
text: Enkosi ngokwabelana nam, {F1_SON_5}. Ndiyazingca kakhulu ngawe.

SourceText: ▶️ Press play to learn the 4️⃣ four things you can do to support your child when they share something difficult with you.
text: ▶️ Cofa dlala ukuze ufunde 4️⃣izinto ezine onokuzenza ukuze uxhase umntwana wakho xa esabelana nawe ngento enzima.

SourceText: 4️⃣ Here are four things you can do to support your child when they share something difficult with you:
text: Nazi izinto ezine onokuzenza ukuze uxhase umntwana wakho xa esabelana nawe ngento enzima:

SourceText: 1️⃣ BREATHE: Take a pause
text: 1️⃣ PHEFUMLA: Thatha umzuzu

SourceText: 🌱 Take a deep breath so you can respond calmly.
text: 🌱 Thatha umoya onzulu ukuze ukwazi ukuphendula ngokuzolileyo.

SourceText: 💛 Ask yourself, “What does my child need right now?”
text: Zibuze, "Umntwana wam udinga ntoni ngoku?"

SourceText: 2️⃣ LISTEN: Ask your child what is going on
text: 2️⃣ MAMELA: Buza umntwana wakho ukuba kuqhubeka ntoni

SourceText: 👂 Let your child share with you what they need. Sometimes, it may be easier for your child to draw what happened instead of explaining it.
text: 👂 Mvumele umntwana wakho abelane nawe ngakudingayo. Ngamanye amaxesha kungabonakala kulula kumntwana wakho ukuzoba okwenzekileyo kunokuyicacisa.

SourceText: 👀 Notice what they are feeling and tell them what you notice so they feel heard.
text: 👀 Qaphela indlela abavakalelwa ngayo kwaye ubaxelele into oyiqaphelayo ukuze bazive beviwe.

SourceText: 💙 Tell your child that you are there for them and love them.
text: 💙 Mxelele umntwana wakho ukuba ukunye nabo kwaye uyabathanda.

SourceText: 😣Both girls AND boys could face hard times and crisis situations. Remember to check-in with both.
text: 😣Bobabini amantombi KUNYE namakhwenkwe bangajongana namaxesha anzima kunye neemeko ezinzima. Khumbula ukubajonga bobabini.

SourceText: 3️⃣ RESPOND: What might help?
text: 3️⃣ SABELA: Yintoni enganceda?

SourceText: 🔶 You might need to help your child talk about their feelings.
text: 🔶 Kungafuneka umncede umntwana wakho athethe malunga neemvakalelo zakhe.

SourceText: ⏸ In the moment, your child needs you to be there for them with love and accept their feelings.
text: ⏸ Ngalomzuzu, umntwana wakho ukudinga ubekunye naye ngothando kwaye wamkele iimvakalelo zakhe.

SourceText: ➡️ You might need to talk about the actions that you or your child could take to help with what has happened.
text: ➡️ Kusenokufuneka uthethe ngamanyathelo eninokuwathatha wena okanye umntwana wakho ukuze kuncedwe ngento eyenzekileyo.

SourceText: ✅ Remember, you can always type {HELP} to ParentText and get information about resources in your community where you can receive help.
text: ✅ Khumbula, ungasoloko ubhala {HELP} kwi-ParentText kwaye ufumane ulwazi malunga nezixhobo kwindawo ohlala kuyo apho unokufumana uncedo.

SourceText: 4️⃣ COMFORT: Be there for your child
text: 4️⃣ THUTHUZELA: Yiba khona kumntwana wakho

SourceText: 🌷 It can be hard to see your child feeling upset or confused, but there is a lot you can do to support them.
text: 🌷 Kunokuba nzima ukubona umntwana wakho ekhathazekile okanye ebhidekile, kodwa kuninzi onokukwenza ukumxhasa.

SourceText: 💚 They need you to accept them and comfort them when difficult things are going on.
text: 💚Badinga ukuba ubamkele kwaye ubathuthuzele xa kukho izinto ezinzima.

SourceText: 🔄In these moments, maintaining a consistent routine can be particularly helpful. Familiar routines can provide a sense of security and normalcy, helping your child feel safe again.
text: 🔄Kulamaxesha, ukugcina ucwangciso olungaguquguqukiyo kunokuba luncedo ngokukhethekileyo. Iinkqubo eziqhelekileyo zinokunika imvakalelo yokhuseleko kunye nokuqhelekileyo, ukunceda umntwana wakho azive ekhuselekile kwakhona.

SourceText: 🎈 Remind your child again that you love them, and thank them for sharing with you.
text: 🎈 Khumbuza umntwana wakho kwakhona ukuba uyamthanda, kwaye umbulele ngokwabelana nawe.

SourceText: Amazing! 💙 This can help prepare you and your child to face hard situations AND avoid them in the first place.
text: Kuyamangalisa! 💙 Oku kunganceda ukulungiselela wena kunye nomntwana wakho nijongane neemeko ezinzima KWAYE niziphephe kwasekuqaleni.

SourceText: ❌📱 Plan phone-free times in your house, like during meals, homework, or in bed.

SourceText: ⭐ Only let @fields.child_nickname chat online with people they already know. They should never share personal information in a chat room or with strangers.

SourceText: 👀 Before completing forms that ask for personal information, check that the web address begins with https://. Websites that begin with http:// may not be secure.

SourceText: 📝 For older children, you can help them create strong passwords for their accounts. They should be long, not include obvious personal information like your name or birthday, and include upper and lower case letters, numbers and symbols.
text: 📝 Kubantwana abadala, ungabanceda benze amagama ayimfihlo aqinileyo kwii-akhawunti zabo. Kufuneka zibe nde, zingaquki iinkcukacha zobuqu ezicacileyo njengegama lakho okanye usuku lwakho lokuzalwa, kwaye ziquke oonobumba abakhulu nabancinci, amanani kunye neempawu.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to keep your teens safe in your community. 🚩
text: Esi sifundo simalunga nokufunda indlela yokugcina umntwana wakho ofikisayo ekhuselekile kwindawo ohlala kuyo. 🚩

SourceText: You are not alone! Parents all over the world say they worry about keeping their children safe.
text: Awukho wedwa! Abazali kwilizwe jikelele bathi bayaxhalaba malunga nokugcina abantwana babo bekhuselekile.

SourceText: Let’s test your knowledge about teen safety.
text: Masikhe sivavanye ulwazi lwakho malunga nokhuseleko lwabantwana abafikisayo.

SourceText: Which of these is a space guaranteed to keep your teen safe?
text: Yeyiphi kwezi eyindawo eqinisekisiweyo yokugcina umntwana wakho ofikisayo ekhuselekile?

SourceText: Your teen can face harm anywhere, even at home 🏠 or church ⛪. As parents, it's our job to help them plan 📝 to avoid tough situations and handle them if they happen, no matter where they are 🌍.
text: Umntwana wakho usenokujongana nokwenzakala naphi na, nokuba kusekhaya 🏠 okanye ecaweni ⛪. Njengabazali, ngumsebenzi wethu ukumnceda ukuba ahlale 📝 ephepha iimeko ezinzima kwaye ajongane nazo ukuba ziyenzeka, nokuba ziphi na 🌍.

SourceText: 🎉You're right.
text: 🎉Ulungile.

SourceText: One way to keep your teen safe is to create a safety map with them. Together, identify the safe and unsafe places in your community. 📖
text: Enye indlela yokugcina umntwana wakho ofikisayo ekhuselekile kukwenza imephu yokhuseleko kunye nabo. Nikunye, chongani iindawo ezikhuselekileyo nezingakhuselekanga kwindawo ohlala kuyo. 📖

SourceText: Here are 3️⃣three steps to help you make a safety map together:
text: Nanga 3️⃣amanyathelo amathathu okukunceda wenze imaphu yokhuseleko kunye:

SourceText: Step 1️⃣: **DRAW**
text: Inyathelo 1️⃣: **ZOBA**

SourceText: 🚩 Include the main places: streets, your house, school, shops, and places your teen visits.
text: 🚩 Bandakanya indawo eziphambili: izitalato, indlu yakho, isikolo, iivenkile, kunye neendawo umntwana wakho azindwendwelayo.

SourceText: Step 2️⃣: **DECIDE**
text: Inyathelo 2️⃣: **GQIBA**

SourceText: 👂 Listen to your teen: they might know more than you think they do about where it is safe or unsafe.
text: 👂 Mamele umntwana wakho ofikisayo: basenokwazi ngaphezu kokuba ucinga malunga nendawo ekhuselekileyo okanye engakhuselekanga

SourceText: 🔵 CIRCLE the places that are safe for teenagers.
text: 🔵 YENZA ISANGQA kwiindawo ezikhuselekileyo ebantwaneni abafikisayo.

SourceText: ❌ CROSS OFF any places that are unsafe for teenagers.
text: ❌ NQAMLA naziphi na iindawo ezingakhuselekanga kubantwana abafikisayo.

SourceText: Step 3️⃣: **DISCUSS**
text: Step 3️⃣: **XOXA**

SourceText: 👀 Discuss where you and your teen can get support in a crisis. These places may include home, school, police station, or a clinic.
text: 👀 Xoxani apho wena kunye nomtwana wakho ofikisayo ningafumana inkxaso xa nisengxakini. Ezindawo zingaquka ikhaya, isikolo, isikhululo samapolisa, okanye iklinikhi.

SourceText: 🚩 MARK these areas clearly with a ⭐ star on your map.
text: 🚩 PHAWULA ezi ndawo ngokucacileyo ⭐ ngenkwenkwezi kwimephu yakho.

text: Yenza imephu yokhuseleko lwasekuhlaleni kunye nomntwana wakho ofikisayo. Qiniseka ukuba umamele iingcinga zabo!

SourceText: It can be hard to think about dangerous situations for your teen.
text: Kunokuba nzima ukucinga ngeemeko eziyingozi kumntwana wakho ofikisayo.

SourceText: To keep our teens safe, we need to understand their reality and the potential risky situations they can find themselves in.
text: Ukugcina abantwana bethu abafikisayo bekhuselekile, kufuneka siqonde ubunyani babo kunye neemeko ezinomngcipheko abanokuthi bazifumane bakuzo.

SourceText: We can help our teens know how to use their thoughts and voices, in dangerous situations. It makes a big difference!
text: Sinokunceda abantwana bethu abafikisayo bazi indlela yokusebenzisa iingcinga kunye namazwi abo, kwiimeko ezinobungozi. Kwenza umahluko omkhulu!

SourceText: Check out these scenarios. What warning signs do you see?
text: Jonga ezi meko. Zeziphi iimpawu ezilumkisayo ozibonayo?

SourceText: **Boy**: Hey beautiful, why are you walking so fast! Don’t you want to come show us what is under that skirt?
text: **Mfana**: Haybo nzwakazi, kutheni uhamba ngokukhawuleza! Awufuni ukuza usibonise yintoni ephantsi kweso siketi?

SourceText: It’s okay to compliment and show attention, but it must be done respectfully.
text: Kulungile ukuncoma nokubonisa ingqalelo, kodwa kufuneka kwenziwe ngembeko.

SourceText: In this case, the boy’s friend should speak up and correct his friend’s behaviour.
text: Kule meko, umhlobo wenkwenkwe kufuneka athethe kwaye alungise ukuziphatha komhlobo wakhe.

SourceText: Let’s try another. What are the warning signs?
text: Masizameni enye. Zeziphi iimpawu ezilumkisayo?

SourceText: **{TEACHER_1}**: {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, if you want to get good grades this year, you need to stay after school when everyone is gone so I can tutor you.
text: **{TEACHER_1}**: {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, ukuba ufuna ukupasa kakuhle kulo nyaka, kufuneka uhlale ukuphuma kwesikolo xa wonke umntu emkile ukuze ndikufundise.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: My friend also needs support. Can I invite her too?
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Umhlobo wam naye ufuna inkxaso. Ndingammema naye?

SourceText: **{TEACHER_1}**: No, this will be our secret. You don’t want people to think you are stupid, right?
text: **{TEACHER_1}**: Hayi, izakuba yimfihlelo yethu le. Awufuni abantu bacinge ukuba usisidenge, akunjalo?

SourceText: 🎉That’s right.
text: 🎉Oku kulungile.

SourceText: Schools have strict rules to keep students safe. The teacher is abusing his power and knows it's wrong ❌. He has likely done this before and might do it again 🔁. {F2_DAUGHTER_17} could try to find others with the same experience 👥 to make reporting him easier 🗣️.
text: Izikolo zinemithetho engqongqo yokugcina abafundi bekhuselekile. Utitshala usebenzisa kakubi igunya lakhe yaye uyazi ukuba akulunganga ❌. Kusenokwenzeka ukuba uyenzile le nto ngaphambili kwaye unokuyiphinda ayenze kwakhona 🔁. {F2_DAUGHTER_17} unokuzama ukufumana abanye abanamava afanayo 👥 ukwenzela ukumxela kube lula 🗣️.

SourceText: The correct answer was “The teacher abuses his power and pressures the girl”.
text: Impendulo echanekileyo ibisithi “Utitshala ulisebenzisa kakubi igunya lakhe kwaye ucinezela intombazana”.

SourceText: In a dangerous situation, we might freeze ❄️ or get angry 😡 – that’s normal. These tools can help keep you and your teen safe: KNOW IT, SEE IT, SAY IT
text: Kwimeko enobungozi, sisenokuba ngumkhenkce ❄️ okanye sibe nomsindo 😡 – iqhelekile loo nto. Ezi zixhobo zinokukunceda ugcine wena kunye nomntwana wakho ofikisayo nikhuselekile: YAZI, YIBONE, YITHETHE

SourceText: 1️⃣ **KNOW IT**

Know the difference between healthy and unhealthy relationships ❤️❌. If you're attacked, it’s never your fault. Do what you need to stay safe and get away —don't worry about what others think. You are worth defending 💪. You are strong and powerful ⚡.
text: Wazi umahluko phakathi kobudlelwane obunempilo kunye nobungenampilo ❤️❌. Ukuba uyahlaselwa, ayilotyala lakho. Yenza oko kufunekayo ukuze uhlale ukhuselekile kwaye ubaleke - ungakhathazeki malunga nokuba abanye bacinga ntoni. Kufanelekile ukuba uzikhusele 💪. Womelele kwaye unamandla ⚡.

SourceText: 2️⃣ **SEE IT**
text: 2️⃣ **YIBONE**

SourceText: If someone makes you or anyone else feel uncomfortable with what they say or do, it’s never okay! We all have the right to feel safe, especially at home 🏠. Trust your gut. If you feel attacked by words or actions, your goal is to get away.
text: Ukuba umntu wenza ukuba wena okanye nabani na ongomnye azive engonwabanga ngento ayithethayo okanye ayenzayo, ayisoze ilunge! Sonke sinelungelo lokuziva sikhuselekile, ingakumbi ekhaya 🏠. Themba imvakalelo yakho. Ukuba uziva uhlaselwa ngamazwi okanye ngezenzo, injongo yakho kukubaleka.

SourceText: 3️⃣ **SAY IT**
text: 3️⃣ **YITHETHE**

SourceText: Your voice can stop many attacks.
text: Ilizwi lakho linokunqanda uhlaselo oluninzi.

SourceText: Be clear, confident, and direct. Use your voice, body language, and eye contact. If you don't feel safe, you can do whatever it takes to get away.
text: Cacisa, zithembe, kwaye ungqale. Sebenzisa ilizwi lakho, ulwimi lomzimba, kunye nokudibana kwamehlo. Ukuba awuziva ukhuselekile, ungenza nantoni na ukuze ubaleke.

SourceText: Using your voice can look different in different situations. You could shout "No!", call for help, act strangely to confuse the attacker, or negotiate.
text: Ukusebenzisa ilizwi lakho kunokubonakala ngokwahlukileyo kwiimeko ezahlukeneyo. Unokukhwaza uthi “Hayi!”, cela uncedo, wenze ngendlela engaqhelekanga ukubhidisa umhlaseli, okanye uthethathethwano.

SourceText: Here are some things you might say or shout to avoid a tough situation:
text: Nazi ezinye izinto onokuthi uzithethe okanye uzikhwaze ukuphepha imeko enzima:

SourceText: “I will call the police if you touch me again 🚔.”
text: "Ndiza kufowunela amapolisa ukuba uyandibamba kwakhona🚔."

SourceText: “Do not touch my bum!” 👎
text: "Musa ukubamba iimpundu zam!" 👎

SourceText: Or you might say:
text: Okanye unokuthi:

SourceText: “No lift for me, thanks! Last time I got a lift, I threw up!” 🤮
text: “Andiceli kuqatyeliswa, enkosi! Ukugqibela kwam ukuqatyeliswa, ndaphalaza!” 🤮

SourceText: “I will give you my phone if you let me go.” 📱
text: "Ndiza kukunika ifowuni yam ukuba uyandiyeka ndihambe." 📱

SourceText: Think about what you would do in some of the examples we have looked at. There is no wrong answer! ✨
text: Cinga ngento obuya kuyenza kweminye yemizekelo esikhe sayijonga. Akukho mpendulo iphosakeleyo! ✨

SourceText: Remember, if someone hurts you, it’s never your fault. Ask someone you trust for help 🤝. Make sure your teen knows they can tell you anything so you can find a solution together.
text: Ukuba umntu uyakonzakalisa, khumbula ukuba ayilotyala lakho. Cela uncedo kumntu omthembileyo 🤝. Qinisekisa ukuba umntwana wakho ofikisayo uyazi ukuba unokukuxelela nantoni na ukuze nifumane isisombululo kunye.

SourceText: Help your teen be prepared by repeating this lesson together. To repeat this lesson you can type {PREVENT} after we finish. Can you do it today?
text: Nceda umntwana wakho ofikisayo azilungiselele ngokuphinda esi sifundo kunye. Ukuphinda esi sifundo ungacofa {PREVENT} emva kokuba sigqibile. Ungayenza namhlanje?

SourceText: That’s great! ✨
text: Kwakuhle oko! ✨

SourceText: That's OK! 💛Plan to set aside an hour in the next few days to have this conversation with your teen.
text: Kulingile! 💛 Cwangcisa ukubekela bucala iyure kwezi ntsuku zimbalwa zilandelayo ukuze ube nale ncoko nomntwana wakho.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to respond to crises when they happen. ❗
text: Esi sifundo simalunga nokufunda indlela yokuphendula kwiingxaki xa zisenzeka. ❗

SourceText: When our teens share something that is very hard or upsetting to them, we need to remember to stay calm, listen, and be open so that they feel supported. 💛
text: Xa abantwana bethu abafikisayo besabelana ngento enzima kakhulu okanye ebacaphukisayo, kufuneka sikhumbule ukuhlala sizolile, simamele, kwaye sivuleleke ukuze bazive bexhaswa. 💛

SourceText: Here is an example of supporting  your teen, even when something really bad happens.
text: Nanku umzekelo wokuxhasa umntwana wakho ofikisayo, nokuba kukho into embi kakhulu eyenzekayo.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Shame my dear, you look really upset, do you want to tell me what happened?
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Torho sthandwa, ubonakala ukhathazeke nyani, uyafuna ukundibalisela ukuba kwenzeke ntoni?

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: It’s my Uncle, he… he… he touched me.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Ngumalume wam, u... u... uye wandiphatha.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER} (thinking): Take a deep breath... What does my child need? She needs me to be calm and  comforting and to listen if she wants to talk.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}** (ecinga): Phefumla... Udinga ntoni umntwana wam? Ufuna ndizole ndithuthuzele ndize ndimamele xa efuna ukuthetha.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Come and sit down next to me. Take your time, I’m listening.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Yiza uhlale phantsi ecaleni kwam. Thatha ixesha lakho, ndimamele.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: It’s true, he… he… made me do it! He made me have sex with him! I didn’t want to, I swear, and I even said NO, but he told me I would be in trouble.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Yinyani, u... u... undenze ukuba ndiyenze! Wandenza ndalala naye! Bendingafuni, ndiyafunga, kwaye ndide ndathi HAYI, kodwa wandixelela ukuba ndiza kuba sengxakini.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Thank you for sharing this with me. You are not in trouble. This is not your fault.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Enkosi ngokwabelana nam ngalento. Awukho sengxakini. Ayilotyala lakho eli.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Yesterday when you went to see your friend. He just came and that’s when it happened.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Izolo ngokuya ubuyokubona umhlobo wakho. Uvele wafika kwaye kungeloxesha yenzeke ngalo.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: It’s okay, I believe you my child. This is a big thing and we will find a way to get the help we need. Where could we go for help?
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Kulungile, ndiyakukholelwa mntwana wam. Yinto enkulu lena kwaye sizakufumana indlela yokufumana uncedo esiludingayo. Singayaphi ukufumana uncedo?

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: The clinic?
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Ekliniki?

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: That is a great suggestion, {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, let’s go to the clinic. They will know what we can do to help you. Does that sound okay to you?
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Licebo elihle elo, {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, masiye ekliniki. Baya kuyazi into esinokuyenza ukuze sikuncede. Ngaba oko kuvakala kulungile kuwe?

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Yes… Okay… But will you come with me?
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Ewe… Kulungile… Kodwa ungahamba nam?

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Of course I will. And {F2_DAUGHTER_17}? Remember this is not your fault. You did nothing to deserve this. I love you. We will get through this.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Nakanjani ndizakwenza njalo. Kwaye {F2_DAUGHTER_17}? Khumbula ayilotyala lakho eli. Awenzanga nto ifanelwe yile nto. Ndiyakuthanda. Siza kudlula kule nto.

SourceText: Here are some things you can do to support your teen when they share something difficult with you:
text: Nazi ezinye izinto onokuzenza ukuze uxhase umntwana wakho ofikisayo xa esabelana nawe ngento enzima:

SourceText: 1️⃣ **BREATHE**: Take a pause
text: 1️⃣ **PHEFUMLA**: Thatha umzuzu

SourceText: 💛 Ask yourself, “What does my teen need right now?”
text: 💛 Zibuze, "Yintoni edingwa ngumntwana wam ofikisayo ngoku?"

SourceText: 3️⃣ **RESPOND**: What might help what is going on?
text: 3️⃣ **PHENDULA**: Yintoni enokunceda lento eyenzekayo?

SourceText: 🔶 You might need to help your teen talk about their feelings or redirect their focus.
text: 🔶 Unokufuna ukunceda umntwana wakho ofikisayo ukuba athethe ngeemvakalelo zakhe okanye uqondise ingqwalasela yakhe.

SourceText: ➡️ You might need to talk about the actions that you or your teen could take to help with what has happened.
text: ➡️ Kusenokufuneka uthethe ngamanyathelo eninokuwathatha wena okanye umntwana wakho ofikisayo ukuze kuncedwe ngento eyenzekileyo.

SourceText: ⏸ Now isn’t the time to talk about how to keep safe in the future. Right now, your teen needs you to be there for them with love.
text: ⏸ Ngoku ayiloxesha lokuthetha ngendlela yokumgcina ekhuselekile kwixesha elizayo. Okwangoku, umntwana wakho ofikisayo ufuna ukuba ubekhona ngakuye nothando.

SourceText: ✅ Remember, you can always type {HELP} to ParentText and get information about resources in your community where you can get help.
text: ✅ Khumbula, ungasoloko ubhala {HELP} kwi-ParentText kwaye ufumane ulwazi malunga nezixhobo kwindawo ohlala kuyo apho unokufumana uncedo.

SourceText: Great! ✨ This can help prepare you and your teen for difficult situations AND avoid them happening in the first place.
text: Kuyamangalisa! ✨ Oku kunganceda ukulungiselela wena kunye nomntwana wakho ofikisayo nijongane neemeko ezinzima KWAYE niziphephe kwasekuqaleni.

SourceText: That's OK! 💛Plan to set aside an hour in the next few days to have this conversation with your teen. This can help prepare you and your teen for difficult situations AND avoid them happening in the first place.
text: Oko KULUNGILE! 💛Cwangcisa ukubekela bucala iyure kwiintsuku ezimbalwa ezizayo ukuze ube nale ncoko nomntwana wakho ofikisayo. Oku kunokukunceda ukulungiselela wena kunye nomntwana wakho ofikisayo kwiimeko ezinzima KWAYE uziphephe ukuba zenzeke kwasekuqaleni.

text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: Umzuzu nje, ndiyayigqibezela le vidiyo yeTikTok.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: You are a really great dancer! Tell me about why you like it.
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Ungumdanisi obalaseleyo ngokwenene! Ndixelele isizathu sokuba ukuthande.

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: All my friends are on it. I have more than 600 likes and 120 followers.
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: Bonke abahlobo bam bakuyo. Ndinee-likes ezingaphezulu kwamakhulu asithandathu kunye nabalandeli abalikhulu namashumi amabini.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: I’m proud of how well you dance, {F1_DAUGHTER_13}. But we need to make sure you are safe on this. I know your friends look at TikTok, but with an open account there are also paedophiles who look at videos of teenagers. Paedophiles are adults who are sexually attracted to young children and teens.
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Ndiyazingca ngendlela odanisa kamnandi ngayo, {F1_DAUGHTER_13}. Kodwa kumele siqinisekise ukuba ukhuselekile kulento. Paedophiles ngabantu abadala abancwase ukwabelana ngesondo nabantwana abancinci okanye abafikisayo.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Let’s look together online at how we can keep this fun for you but also safe. Look – you can make your account private and control who follows you. So you can accept people you know but not strangers. Can we make a rule together that you can use TikTok but with a private account? I trust you to know who to accept!
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Makhe sijonge kunye kwi-intanethi ukuba singayigcina isonwabisa njani kuwe lento kwakhona kodwa ikhuselekile. Jonga unokwenza i-akhawunti yakho ibe yimfihlo kwaye ulawule ukuba ngubani na okulandelayo. Ngoko ke unokwamkela abantu obaziyo kodwa hayi abantu ongabaziyo. Ingaba singawenza umthetho kunye ukuba ungasebenzisa uTikTok kodwa nge-akhawunti yabucala? Ndiyakuthemba ukuba uyazi ukuba wamkela bani!

SourceText: Set up safe online habits at home.
text: Misela imikhwa ekhuselekileyo ye-intanethi ekhaya.

SourceText: ⭐ Create rules with @fields.child_nickname about who they can chat with online. It is safest to only chat with people they already know. They should never share personal information in a chat room or with strangers.
text: ⭐ Yenza imithetho no@fields.child_nickname malunga nokuba angancokola nabani kwi-intanethi. Kukhuselekile ukuncokola kuphela nabantu asele ebazi. Akumelanga abelane ngenkcazelo yobuqu kwindawo yokuncokola okanye nabantu abangabaziyo.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 📝 Help @fields.child_nickname create strong passwords for their accounts. They should be long, not include obvious personal information like your name or birthday, and include upper and lower case letters, numbers and symbols.
text: 📝 Nceda u@fields.child_nickname enze amagama ayimfihlo aqinileyo kwii-akhawunti zakhe. Kufuneka zibe nde, zingaquki iinkcukacha zobuqu ezicacileyo njengegama lakho okanye usuku lwakho lokuzalwa, kwaye ziquke oonobumba abakhulu nabancinci, amanani kunye neempawu.

SourceText: 2️⃣ **BUILD TRUST** with your teen.
text: 2️⃣ **YAKHA UKUTHEMBA** nomntwana wakho ofikisayo.

SourceText: 💙 If you come across anything worrying together, talk about it with your teen. If you need support, type {HELP} after you complete today’s lesson or any other time you need extra support.

SourceText: 🚩Teach your teen that if a stranger offers gifts, like virtual coins, in exchange for photos and personal information and tells them to keep it a secret, they should tell you.
text: 🚩Fundisa umntwana wakho ofikisayo ukuba xa umntu angamaziyo empha izipho, njenge mali ezinkozo, efuna ukutshintshiselana ngeefoto kunye neenkcukacha zakhe, aze amxelele ukuba ayigcine iyimfihlelo, ufanele akuxelele.

SourceText: 🌷 Together, look at websites, social media, games, and apps your teen uses.
text: 🌷 Nikunye, jongani ii-webhusayithi, amakhasi onxibelelwano, imidlalo kunye nee apps azisebenzisayo umntwana wakho ofikisayo.

SourceText: 👂 Ask questions - this helps you learn more about your teen’s interests!

SourceText: ✅ Tell your teen that they should tell an adult if they feel scared, unsafe or upset about something online.
